steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says maize doesn't closely resemble any wild plant, so its ancestor wasn't obvious — "only recently" did genetic research uncover that the ancestor is teosinte grass. The blank describes what genetic research did regarding the ancestor.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean disclosed or uncovered — maize's ancestor wasn't obvious from appearance, and genetic research brought the hidden fact to light. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — expanded: research "expanded its ancestor to be teosinte grass" — expanded means made larger or broader, which doesn't fit revealing an identity. ✗
  • Choice B — revealed: research "revealed its ancestor to be teosinte grass" — revealed means uncovered or made known, exactly what genetic research did with the previously hidden ancestry. ✓
  • Choice C — encouraged: research "encouraged its ancestor to be teosinte grass" — encouraged means inspired or motivated, which can't describe how research identifies a plant ancestor. ✗
  • Choice D — petitioned: research "petitioned its ancestor to be teosinte grass" — petitioned means formally requested something from an authority, which makes no sense in this context. ✗
